overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person perspective of a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street. The character navigates sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues through the dense urban canyon of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with corporate and commercial signage

events.description: character accelerates from standing to steady walking pace along the sidewalk
futuristic sedan with glowing accents drives past on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the north sidewalk, passing beneath holographic billboards and neon signs

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated red Arasaka logo on the facade
large purple neon sign with stylized text mounted on building corner
enclosed pedestrian bridge with curved glass panels connecting buildings
giant floating holographic advertisement showing a character in samurai pose

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city sidewalk with yellow tactile paving. The character walks forward between towering buildings, passing the Arasaka corporate headquarters on the left and the prominent purple 'WET DREAM' neon sign on the right. An elevated glass walkway extends overhead on the left, while futuristic vehicles cruise along the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
character pauses mid-crosswalk to allow a futuristic white sedan to pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: character navigating across the wide intersection, timing movements between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
futuristic sports car waiting at the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: broad yellow parallel lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
red structural pole with traffic lights and signage extending over the street
red illuminated sign with white text mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection, stepping onto the prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. While crossing, they navigate between futuristic vehicles including a silver sedan and a waiting sports car. The traffic control pole rises in the center of the frame, and the 'SILK ROAD' sign becomes visible on the right building as the character moves toward the opposite curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with industrial ventilation systems

events.description: character steps onto the opposite sidewalk, leaving the crosswalk behind
heavyset pedestrian in sleeveless shirt walks past the camera, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: character continuing east along the south sidewalk, passing large industrial ventilation fans and storefronts

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in brown vest walking toward and past the camera

entered.detail: two massive circular ventilation fans mounted on the building facade with metal grilles
yellow rectangular sign with black text and symbols warning of hazards
vertical pink and blue neon light strips mounted on poles along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk where large industrial ventilation fans dominate the right-side building facade, accompanied by a yellow danger warning sign. Neon pole lights line the left edge of the walkway. A heavyset pedestrian passes close to the camera around the 46-second mark, briefly blocking the view before the character continues past commercial storefronts toward the distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban canyon that transitions from a corporate sidewalk into a busy intersection and finally toward an industrial city block. It begins on a sidewalk with yellow tactile paving, moving past the Arasaka corporate headquarters and a glowing purple Wet Dream sign beneath an elevated glass walkway. As the character advances, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera navigates across yellow crosswalk stripes between silver sedans and waiting sports cars. The view then shifts toward the opposite curb, passing a Silk Road sign before moving along a walkway lined with neon pole lights. Finally, the camera pushes past large industrial ventilation fans and a passing pedestrian, continuing along a row of commercial storefronts toward the distant skyscrapers.
